overview.description: The iShares Broad USD Floating Rate Loan ETF (USLN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is passively managed to track a market value-weighted index of USD-denominated institutional floating rate loans. USLN was launched on Mar 3, 2026 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Morningstar LSTA US Leveraged Loan Broad Select Index
